nodes.name: Gemini + File Search
nodes.notes:
⚠️ CONFIGURE:
1. Set GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY in n8n environment variables
   (Settings → Environment Variables)
   OR replace $env.GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY with your key directly

2. Replace YOUR_FILE_SEARCH_STORE_ID with your actual
   File Search Store name from Google AI Studio
   (e.g., 'fileSearchStores/nils-support-docs-abc123')

Model: gemini-2.0-flash (fast, cheap, good)
Swap to gemini-2.5-pro for complex queries.

parameters.content: Parse User Message + Build Conversation Context
Gemini AI → Answer with Knowledge Base Search
Return AI Response to Chat Widget
